body: [{"ac":1,"text":"internal/routing/engine.go declares FilterReasonCredentialMissing, FilterReasonCredentialInvalid, FilterReasonCreditExhausted, FilterReasonProviderUnreachable as FilterReason values with the documented snake_case string forms ('credential_missing','credential_invalid','credit_exhausted','provider_unreachable').","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":2,"text":"routing.Inputs has a new map field (e.g. ProviderEligibilityOverrides map[string]ProviderEligibilityOverride{FilterReason, ProbeAt}) that the engine consults inside buildHarnessCandidates after the existing ProbeUnreachable gate. When a provider key matches, the candidate is set eligible=false with the typed FilterReason from the map and Reason populated with a stable human-readable string.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":3,"text":"An explicit provider/harness/model pin bypasses the override exactly like the existing endpoint_unreachable gate.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":4,"text":"Engine-level unit test in internal/routing/ (e.g. credential_health_gate_test.go) asserts: a. Each of the four new FilterReasons gates a matching provider when no pin is present. b. Explicit provider pin bypasses each gate. c. Map is nil-safe and absent providers are unaffected.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":5,"text":"cd /Users/erik/Projects/fizeau \u0026\u0026 go test ./internal/routing/... green and full go test ./... green.","kind":"build-gate","verifiable":true},{"ac":6,"text":"No regression in service_adr005_test.go or service_routing_test.go.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false}]
